title: Grappling Hook: Neo
description: This mod add various grappling hooks for you to traverse your world in style.
body:
This is a NeoForge 1.21.1 fork of the [Grappling Hook mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/grappling-hook-mod). The aim of this mod is to provide a fun way to get around large builds like cities.

Fabric will not be supported. An unofficial fabric/quilt port is in-progress [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/grappling-hook-mod-fabric).
